title: dactylis polygama var. trichophora
intro: Dactylis polygama var. trichophora, also known as orchard grass, is a type of grass native to Europe and Western Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of orchard grass include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and support respiratory health, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Orchard grass can be prepared for use as a tea, tincture, or dried herb, with some herbalists also using it in combination with other plants to enhance its medicinal properties.
